chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Divorce of a Woman Who Has Not Been Consummated and the Ruling on a Woman Whose Husband Passes Away Before or After Consummation

text: 4777 - وَ رُوِيَ: "أَنَّ أَدْنَاهُ اَلْخِمَارُ وَ شِبْهُهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4777 - It is narrated: "The minimum (parting gift) is a headscarf or something similar to it."
